Copy Block Link: Copy link to current block or heading

scriptConfig.expression:
const { metadataCache: m } = app, e = ntb.app.workspace.activeEditor?.editor, f = ntb.app.workspace.getActiveFile(), l = e?.getCursor().line, b = e?.getLine(l).match(/\^([\w-]+)/)?.[1] || m.getFileCache(f)?.blocks?.[l]?.id;
b ? (navigator.clipboard.writeText(`[[${f.path}#^${b}]]`), new Notice(ntb.t('api.msg.clipboard-copied'))) : new Notice(ntb.t('api.msg.block-no-id'));
